datasetAgreementGeneral: This XGBoost-based risk stratification model is developed for predicting patient risk scores across cancer and diabetes research contexts. Access is open to all qualified researchers regardless of domain.
term1: You acknowledge that this model is designed for research-based risk stratification and must not be used for clinical risk assessment without institutional validation.
term2: You agree not to use this model for any illegal, unethical, or harmful activities.
term3: You are required to provide proper attribution to the model developers in all publications and presentations.
term4: You accept that all outcomes are solely at your discretion and the developers disclaim any liability.
term5: You agree to report any significant modifications to the original developers.
term6: You agree not to redistribute this model to third parties without explicit written permission.
